mapper.select: SELECT aa.id AS attemptId, a.id AS assessmentId, a.title AS assessmentTitle, a.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS courseTitle, aa.score, a.total_score AS totalScore, a.pass_score AS passScore, CASE WHEN aa.passed = 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS passed FROM assessment_attempt aa JOIN assessment a ON a.id = aa.assessment_id LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = a.course_id WHERE aa.id = #{attemptId}

SELECT #{assessmentId} AS assessmentId, COUNT(*) AS participantCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.passed = 1 AND aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.passed = 0 AND aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0), 2) AS averageScore, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0) AS highestScore, COALESCE(MIN(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0) AS lowestScore FROM assessment_attempt aa WHERE aa.assessment_id = #{assessmentId}
